title: Causal Linkage Task Annotation
description: Causal reasoning task for videos: given two timestamps t1 and t2, explain the causal relationship between the event observed at t1 and the resulting situation at t2.

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

items.description: Array of causal linkage items, one per question-answer pair

video_id.description: Reference to video ID (matches directory name in contextual/)

video_type.description: High-level content classification of the video

t1.description: Timestamp of the causal event in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '01:30', '00:01:30', '01:30.5')

t2.description: Timestamp of the resulting situation in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '01:30', '00:01:30', '01:30.5')

question.description: Full natural-language question asking to explain the causal relationship between t1 and t2

answer.description: Free-text causal explanation of how the event at t1 led to the situation at t2

reasoning.description: Optional step-by-step reasoning trace leading to the answer

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search

items.question: Explain the relationship between the event at 00:00:01 and the situation at 00:00:07.
items.answer: At 00:00:01, a dark pickup truck enters the intersection from the right to initiate a left-hand turn, while at 00:00:07, a silver sedan has come to a complete halt in the center of the intersection, facing the opposite direction of its original travel. The relationship between these two moments is a direct causal link resulting from a failure to yield right-of-way.
items.reasoning: The video begins by establishing a baseline of normal traffic flow at a busy intersection. At 00:00:01, several vehicles including a white utility van and a tan minivan are stopped at a red light...

metadata.description: Causal linkage between traffic events and resulting situations in anomalous ITS videos
